sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n60210" key="kruai/nw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κρυαίνω</orth>, <sense id="n60210.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἱμείρω</ref></xr>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Theognost.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Can.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">21</biblScope> </bibl> (cf. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0232.tlg001:176" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Archil.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">176</biblScope> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
